audit_findings.finding: 6 non-test .lock().unwrap() calls in FactorRegistry impl — if any holder panics mid-lock, subsequent callers cascade-panic. Same vulnerability class as moni-strategy sessions.rs fixed in b877104.
audit_findings.remediation: Replace each .lock().unwrap() with .lock().unwrap_or_else(|p| { eprintln!(...); p.into_inner() }) matching b877104 template.
